rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts with visible ports
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features only
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid scalar types (int, real, bool)
Assignments in AGREE are valid only in implementation scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted identifiers
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names (e.g., Deadline, Period) as AGREE variables
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
